error_signature: Loop over items had a batch size of 10000
title: Incorrect batch size in Loop over items
symptom: The user experiences unexpected output with a cartesian product of merged items instead of the desired one-by-one merges.
not_this_if: No merging of objects is performed
root_cause: Setting a high batch size in the Loop over items causes n8n to process multiple items at once, leading to unintended combinations of parent and child objects instead of the desired one-to-one merging.
fix_steps: Open the Loop over items node settings
Change the batch size from 10000 to 1
agent_instruction: Set the batch size in the Loop over items to 1 to achieve the desired merging behavior.
